caption: A person's hand holds and manipulates a cardboard shipping box over a desk. The box features printed text including "848", "1/120 Count", "PKG0090402", and a barcode. Part of a sentence reads "certificate for this product shipment please refer to www.topps.com/coa". The box is moved from a tilted position to a flat view, then tilted again. In the background, a logo for "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" are visible on a dark surface and as an on-screen overlay. A small inset video window shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap sitting at a desk with equipment. As the sequence progresses, the cardboard box is shifted to reveal more of its side and top labels before being tilted away from the camera.
